title: behen vulgaris
intro: Behen vulgaris, also known as Indian rhubarb, is a type of plant that belongs to the Polygonaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of behen vulgaris include treating digestive issues, such as constipation, and reducing inflammation in the body. Behen vulgaris is often prepared into herbal supplements, teas, and extracts to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
